reference: Hi Doctor, I have been a patient of psoriasis for the last ten years. It began on my head and then spots appeared on my body. The condition was cured five years ago, but now the spots have started appearing again on my body, nails, and hair. Is this disease permanently curable?
text: How's that fair? I'm not going to continue to do anything for the last 10 minutes. If you're going on my holiday, I'm going to stop the food on my body. I've been working with kids on days of their own, but now I've stopped the sort of activities on my body, nails, and hair. Is this disease permanently curable?
